pkgmetadata.longdescription: Bisq 2 is the multi-protocol successor to Bisq 1, supporting Bisq Easy (chat-based fiat trades), MuSig non-custodial trades, Submarine atomic swaps, and lightning-based protocols. Distributed as an upstream binary .deb with a bundled Zulu OpenJDK 21 runtime. Coexists with net-p2p/bisq-bin.
